dc_description: A person wearing a bicycle helmet, sleeveless top, cropped pants, socks, shoes, and a backpack stands on the gravel shoulder beside a paved rural road while holding a touring-style bicycle. The bicycle has drop handlebars and a large cylindrical item strapped to the front. The scene is shot from a low angle under a clear blue sky, with dry grass, bushes, utility poles, and overhead wires along the roadside.
novel_visual_observations: The camera is positioned very close to the ground, making the dry grass and gravel shoulder prominent in the foreground. The road has a white edge line and curves or recedes into the distance with sparse roadside vegetation.
rich_context: Ciclabile Campagnano-Nepi, Campagnano di Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00063, Italia
